Our company already works in the car sales business, and wants to expand into car rental.
Car rental is a new line of business for the company.
We never had any experience or system specific to the car rental business.

The business users include the following roles:
 - marketing
 - accounting
 - payment
 - car management (service, delivery, pickup)
 - risk

You are a product owner assigned to this project.
Your task is to focus on the software development life cycle in the planning & requirement analysis phase.
For the functional requirements, analyze the requirements relevant to each user.
For non-functional requirements, focus on the engineering and system operation point of view.
